items.title: Study: most AI-generated videos on social media about the war in Iran push pro-Iranian views, often exaggerating its military capabilities and sophistication (New York Times)
items.title_original: Study: most AI-generated videos on social media about the war in Iran push pro-Iranian views, often exaggerating its military capabilities and sophistication (New York Times)
items.title_en: Study: most AI-generated videos on social media about the war in Iran push pro-Iranian views, often exaggerating its military capabilities and sophistication (New York Times)
items.title_zh: 研究：社交媒体上大多数人工智能生成的有关伊朗战争的视频都宣扬亲伊朗观点，经常夸大其军事能力和复杂程度（纽约时报）
items.title_bilingual: 研究：社交媒体上大多数人工智能生成的有关伊朗战争的视频都宣扬亲伊朗观点，经常夸大其军事能力和复杂程度（纽约时报） / Study: most AI-generated videos on social media about the war in Iran push pro-Iranian views, often exaggerating its military capabilities and sophistication (New York Times)

items.title: The gaming industry is shaping up to be one of the AI boom's biggest casualties, from job losses to rising console prices due to the global RAM shortage (Helen Vogelsong-Donahue/Wired)

items.title_en: The gaming industry is shaping up to be one of the AI boom's biggest casualties, from job losses to rising console prices due to the global RAM shortage (Helen Vogelsong-Donahue/Wired)
items.title_zh: 游戏行业正在成为人工智能热潮的最大受害者之一，从失业到由于全球 RAM 短缺而导致的游戏机价格上涨（Helen Vogelsong-Donahue/Wired）

items.title: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 对 1,000 名招聘经理的调查显示：59% 的人表示他们强调人工智能在裁员或冻结招聘中的作用，“因为它发挥得更好”；只有 9% 的人表示人工智能已经完全取代了角色（Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 对 1,000 名招聘经理的调查显示：59% 的人表示他们强调人工智能在裁员或冻结招聘中的作用，“因为它发挥得更好”；只有 9% 的人表示人工智能已经完全取代了角色（Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg） / A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
